name: Retirement Corpus Calculator
description: Estimate the corpus required to fund retirement expenses based on a withdrawal rate.
formulaDescription: Estimates the amount needed to sustainably withdraw a fixed amount each year.

example.explanation: At 4% withdrawal, ₹6L annual expense needs ₹1.5Cr corpus.

faqs.question: What does withdrawal rate mean?
faqs.answer: It's the percentage of your corpus you withdraw each year. Lower rates require a larger corpus.
